title: EM on EU Commission 2025 work programme (5985/25, COM(2025)45)
body: "This explanatory memorandum is about a European Commission communication: work programme 2025; Moving forward together: A Bolder, Simpler, Faster Union.  It was submitted by the Rt Hon. Nick Thomas-Symonds MP, Paymaster General and Minister for the Constitution and European Union Relations. "
